label: 377_modi_indiaus_india_modis
description: The relationship between the United States and India has evolved significantly since Prime Minister Narendra Modi's tenure. Key areas of focus include domestic production, procurement from abroad, and political summits between leaders.

earliest_articles.title: After the U.S.-India Strategic Dialogue: Not Visionary, but Solid
earliest_articles.excerpt: Hillary Clinton and her distinguished colleagues beat expectations in the just-concluded U.S.-India Strategic Dialogue. earliest_articles.title: Natural Friends
earliest_articles.excerpt: How to assess the 44th president of the United States in his dealings with the world’s largest democracy and one of the world’s two great rising powers of the 21st century? newest_articles.title: What did Trump’s India trip accomplish?
newest_articles.excerpt: U.S. President Donald Trump’s state visit to India was overshadowed by sectarian riots in Delhi, but his meetings with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi helped reinforce areas of security cooperation between the world’s two largest democracies. central_articles.title: Finding a New Normal in U.S.-India Relations
central_articles.excerpt: To hear recent commentary on US-India relations, one would think observers were talking about a fraught relationship, full of crises between two countries with little in common and little interaction. This narrative, however, ignores the broader dynamics of the relationship, as well as how far it has come in a short…

central_articles.excerpt: Next week, Americans will be looking westward to the Tuesday Democratic primary in California.
